name: Tajwar Abrar Aleef, PhD
role: Senior ML Scientist building production clinical and multimodal AI systems.
subheadline: Hello World! I work across agentic LLM systems, multimodal generative AI, and medical imaging with a focus on turning ambitious research and product ideas into dependable real-world systems. My experience spans radiology reporting agents deployed across 160+ healthcare facilities, multimodal video and audio generation platforms, production ML infrastructure, and PhD-level medical imaging research.
expertise: Production ML and MLOps (AWS, GCP, Kubernetes)
